initiatorEmail.description: Email of the admin user requesting the export. Written to AuditLog.

correlationId.description: Optional correlation ID. Flow generates a GUID if empty.

callerNotes.authorization: Canvas App restricts this button to admin users via gblIsAdmin. The flow does not perform backend role validation. App Config data is non-sensitive configuration — acceptable for v1.
callerNotes.fileAccess: The returned fileUrl gives direct access to the exported CSV in the Exports library. Canvas App should offer a 'Download' or 'Open' button using this URL.
callerNotes.duplicateFiles: Each call creates a new timestamped file. Old files are not deleted. Manual cleanup is an admin responsibility.
callerNotes.connectionDependency: CR_DocCentralV3_SharePoint must have Write access to the Exports library.

canvasAppCall.note: No additional inputs required. Call on button click from the Administracija screen.
